title: FabricationDesignSynthesisInterfaces
description: Shared cross-runtime JSON payloads for design-synthesis workers that turn fabrication intent, CAD references, parametric templates, machine/process constraints, and learning hints into generated CAD-ready design candidates before conversion, slicing, CAM, assembly planning, or release review.

FabricationDesignIntent.title: FabricationDesignIntent
FabricationDesignIntent.description: The object, function, dimensions, material preferences, and manufacturing posture a design-synthesis worker should satisfy.

intentId.description: Stable intent id from the planner request.

objective.description: Design objective such as generate-new-part, modify-existing-cad, parametric-variant, fixture-design, replacement-part, assembly-decomposition, or manufacturability-redesign.

functionalRequirements.description: Functional requirements, loads, fits, interfaces, aesthetics, assembly goals, or service constraints.

dimensionalConstraints.description: Dimensional constraints such as envelope, wall thickness, shaft spacing, hole pattern, tolerance, clearance, stock size, or build-volume limits.

manufacturingPreferences.description: Preferred processes or constraints such as fdm-print, resin-print, vertical-mill, horizontal-mill, lathe, router, waterjet, laser, plasma, postprocess, inspection, or assembly.

FabricationDesignReference.title: FabricationDesignReference
FabricationDesignReference.description: Existing CAD, mesh, drawing, scan, slicer, CAM, job-sheet, image, measurement, or text reference available to a design-synthesis worker.

refKind.description: Reference kind such as native-cad, neutral-cad, mesh, drawing, scan, slicer-project, cam-setup, machine-log, inspection-report, operator-note, or exemplar-part.

format.description: Reference format such as SOLIDWORKS, CREO, PROE, FUSION, NX, CATIA, ONSHAPE, FREECAD, OPENSCAD, BLENDER, ZBRUSH, STEP, IGES, STL, 3MF, OBJ, DXF, SVG, PDF, JSON, TXT, or SHOP_TEXT.

uri.description: Sanitized source URI or object key. Do not include credentials, query strings, or fragments.

sha256.description: SHA-256 of the reference artifact when available.

evidence.description: Evidence labels already attached to this reference, such as units-verified, native-source-authorized, mesh-manifold, scan-scaled, drawing-reviewed, or operator-measured.

FabricationDesignTemplate.title: FabricationDesignTemplate
FabricationDesignTemplate.description: Parametric or procedural design template a worker may instantiate or adapt.

templateKind.description: Template kind such as openscad-module, freecad-macro, cadquery-script, fusion-script, feature-template, lattice-template, fixture-template, or assembly-pattern.

sourceFormat.description: Template source format such as OPENSCAD, PYTHON, FREECAD, FUSION_SCRIPT, JSON, YAML, or CADQUERY.

uri.description: Sanitized template URI or object key.

parameters.description: Parameter labels or key=value defaults the worker may tune.

evidence.description: Template evidence such as reviewed-source, unit-tested, manufacturability-reviewed, or known-good-prior.

FabricationDesignCapability.title: FabricationDesignCapability
FabricationDesignCapability.description: Design, translation, simulation, manufacturing, or inspection capability available while synthesizing candidates.

capabilityKind.description: Capability kind such as cad-kernel, mesh-repair, topology-optimization, generative-design, slicer-preview, cam-preview, simulation, machine-process, inspection, or learning-policy.

supportedFormats.description: Source or output formats supported by this capability.

machineClasses.description: Machine classes this capability can target.

limits.description: Limits such as build volume, axis travel, tolerance band, surface finish, stock envelope, or operator-only steps.

FabricationDesignConstraint.title: FabricationDesignConstraint
FabricationDesignConstraint.description: Constraint or evidence requirement the worker must satisfy or retain as a blocker.

constraintKind.description: Constraint kind such as dimensional, material, process, tolerance, strength, thermal, assembly, support-removal, stock-envelope, machine-envelope, postprocess, inspection, learning, or human-review.

severity.description: Severity such as blocker, high, medium, low, warning, or info.

evidenceRequired.description: Evidence labels or ids required to clear this constraint.

FabricationGeneratedDesignArtifact.title: FabricationGeneratedDesignArtifact
FabricationGeneratedDesignArtifact.description: Generated design artifact retained by a synthesis worker for later CAD conversion, assembly planning, instruction generation, inspection, or review.

candidateId.description: Candidate id that produced this artifact.

artifactKind.description: Artifact kind such as parametric-source, native-cad, neutral-cad, mesh, assembly-graph, drawing, simulation-summary, inspection-plan, or manufacturability-report.

format.description: Artifact format such as OPENSCAD, FREECAD, CADQUERY, STEP, IGES, STL, 3MF, OBJ, DXF, JSON, PDF, MD, or TXT.

uri.description: Sanitized artifact URI or object key. Do not include credentials, query strings, or fragments.

sha256.description: SHA-256 of the generated artifact when available.

evidence.description: Evidence labels attached to this artifact, such as units-verified, parametric-source-retained, neutral-export-ready, mesh-manifold, assembly-graph-generated, or manufacturability-reviewed.

FabricationDesignSynthesisBlocker.title: FabricationDesignSynthesisBlocker
FabricationDesignSynthesisBlocker.description: A blocker discovered while generating or selecting a design candidate.

code.description: Stable blocker code such as missing-critical-dimension, native-source-review-required, strength-analysis-required, tolerance-stack-required, support-removal-risk, stock-envelope-risk, machine-envelope-risk, assembly-split-required, or human-review-required.

message.description: Human-readable blocker summary safe for logs.

candidateId.description: Candidate id associated with this blocker when applicable.

constraintId.description: Constraint id associated with this blocker when applicable.

machineReadyImpact.description: Effect on downstream release posture, e.g. blocks-design-release, needs-operator-review, warning-only, conversion-only, or learning-only.

FabricationDesignCandidate.title: FabricationDesignCandidate
FabricationDesignCandidate.description: One generated design candidate and its recommended downstream manufacturing posture.

candidateKind.description: Candidate kind such as monolithic-print, split-print-and-machine, machined-insert, turned-component, sheet-cut-assembly, fixture-assisted, or parametric-variant.

score.description: Worker score for ranking candidates. Larger is better within one result envelope.

machineReady.description: True only when this candidate has enough design evidence for downstream conversion/release consideration.

manufacturingStrategy.description: Recommended manufacturing strategy for this candidate.

artifactIds.description: Generated artifact ids that describe this candidate.

clearedConstraintIds.description: Constraint ids this candidate claims to satisfy.

FabricationDesignLearningHint.title: FabricationDesignLearningHint
FabricationDesignLearningHint.description: Compact MDP/POMDP/neural-policy hint available during design synthesis.

hintKind.description: Hint kind such as mdp-state, pomdp-belief, policy-action, reward-prior, failure-boundary-memory, prior-success, or prior-failure.

features.description: Compact state, observation, reward, or boundary features.

recommendedAction.description: Recommended policy action such as split-part, thicken-wall, add-insert, avoid-supports, add-fixture, or request-human-review.

FabricationDesignSynthesisRequest.title: FabricationDesignSynthesisRequest
FabricationDesignSynthesisRequest.description: Body published on dd.remote.fabrication.design.synthesis.requests for design-generation workers.

schema.description: Envelope schema id. Producers should emit dd.fabrication.design-synthesis.request.v1.

requestId.description: Unique id for this design-synthesis job, suitable for dedupe and result correlation.

planRequestId.description: Fabrication planning request id that spawned this design-synthesis job.

jobId.description: Optional fabrication job id when the planner has already persisted one.

emittedAtMs.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when the planner published this request.

producer.description: Producer service instance or deployment name.

resultSubject.description: Subject workers should publish the result to; defaults to dd.remote.fabrication.design.synthesis.results.

intent.description: Requested object intent and design requirements.

references.description: Source references available to the worker.

templates.description: Parametric or procedural templates available to the worker.

capabilities.description: Design, conversion, manufacturing, inspection, and learning capabilities available for synthesis.

constraints.description: Constraints and evidence requirements the worker must satisfy or retain.

targetFormats.description: Requested output formats for downstream conversion, assembly planning, slicing, CAM, or review.

blockers.description: Planner-known blockers that workers may clear by returning generated candidates or evidence.

priority.description: Optional scheduling hint. Higher values mean more urgent design-synthesis work.

notes.description: Non-secret planning notes for the worker.

FabricationDesignSynthesisResult.title: FabricationDesignSynthesisResult
FabricationDesignSynthesisResult.description: Body published on dd.remote.fabrication.design.synthesis.results with generated design candidates, artifacts, blockers, and downstream readiness evidence.

schema.description: Envelope schema id. Workers should emit dd.fabrication.design-synthesis.result.v1.

requestId.description: Design-synthesis request id this result answers.

planRequestId.description: Fabrication planning request id from the original design-synthesis job.

jobId.description: Optional persisted fabrication job id from the original request.

emittedAtMs.description: Unix epoch milliseconds when the worker published this result.

workerId.description: Worker id, pod name, or adapter instance that produced this result.

synthesizer.description: Design synthesizer, CAD kernel, policy, or adapter used.

synthesizerVersion.description: Synthesizer or model version used for repeatability and audit.

success.description: True when the worker completed its requested design-synthesis or review work.

machineReady.description: True only when returned candidates and artifacts are sufficient for downstream machine-ready release consideration.

selectedCandidateId.description: Best candidate id selected by the worker, when one can be recommended.

artifacts.description: Generated design artifacts retained for downstream workers.

blockers.description: Remaining blockers or new worker-discovered blockers.

learningHints.description: Learning hints retained or emitted by the worker for outcome attribution.

warnings.description: Non-blocking warnings that should be retained with the design evidence.

reviewMetadata.description: Free-form non-secret metadata such as model confidence, feature graph ids, policy names, cost estimates, simulation summaries, or human-review notes.
